pageSubtitle: Define subjects, weekly periods, and optional classes for every active grade

template.confirm: Replace the unsaved curriculum for all active grades with the Afghanistan template?

editor.title: Subjects for Grade {{grade}}
editor.description: These subjects and weekly periods will be synchronized with every class in this grade.
editor.capacityExceededDescription: Remove {{count}} periods before this grade can be applied.
editor.emptyDescription: Add a subject manually or paste several subjects below.

paste.title: Bulk add subjects
paste.description: One subject per row: Name, English name, Code, Periods. Tabs or commas are accepted.

classes.title: Optional class creation
classes.description: Create missing class sections while applying this curriculum. Existing classes are never duplicated.

review.title: Review curriculum impact
review.description: Review the exact changes before they are applied to subjects and classes.
review.classSummary: {{created}} new classes will be created and {{affected}} existing classes will be synchronized.
review.unusedCapacity: Grade {{grade}} will have {{count}} unallocated weekly periods.
review.blockedCapacity: Grade {{grade}} exceeds its weekly capacity by {{count}} periods.
review.otherBlockers: The review found {{count}} issue(s) that must be resolved before applying.
review.confirmRemoval: I understand that {{count}} teacher assignment(s) will be removed.

emptyGrades.title: No active grades
emptyGrades.description: Enable at least one school level before building the curriculum.

toast.nothingToReview: Make at least one curriculum or class change before review.
toast.previewFailed: Could not prepare the curriculum review
toast.applyFailed: Could not apply the school curriculum
